summary: This topic outlines the steps to process employee salaries for a specific month, assuming that salary contracts and pay birthdays have been correctly set up.
steps: Ensure that 'Pay Birthdays' are set for the employee(s) for the target month.
A list of employees will appear. You can search for a single employee or select multiple.
Select the employee(s) for whom you want to process salary.
A 'Success' message will confirm that the salary has been created for the selected employee(s).
business_rules: Employee 'Pay Birthdays' must be configured for the month before salary can be processed.
important_notes: The 'Compute Attendance' module is the primary tool for initiating the monthly salary processing.
Processing salary generates the monthly salary record based on the employee's assigned contract and attendance data.
questions: How do I process salaries for all employees for a specific month?
What are 'Pay Birthdays' and why are they necessary for salary processing?
Can I process salary for individual employees or only in bulk?
Where do I go to start the monthly salary calculation?
related_topics: Viewing and Editing Processed Employee Salaries
